message:
Running command: # Look for nc_chipgen verify subcommand or separate verify tools
find /nc -name "verify*" -type f 2>/dev/null | head -20
echo "---"
find /nc -name "*.py" 2>/dev/null | xargs grep -l "verify" 2>/dev/null | head -20
echo "---"
ls /nc/apps/bin/ 2>/dev/null

args.command:

echo "---"
ls /nc/apps/bin/ 2>/dev/null
